title: Question: threaded compile error message
body:
---


Author Name: **David Stanford**
Original Redmine Message: 2727 from https://www.veripool.org



---

I'm getting the following error message when trying to do a multi-threaded compile: 

```
%Warning-UNOPTTHREADS: AstRoot:1: Thread scheduler is unable to provide requested parallelism; consider asking for fewer threads.


```
however, this is with --threads 2. Does this just mean we're out of luck trying to do a multi-threaded compile on this design?
code_blocks: %Warning-UNOPTTHREADS: AstRoot:1: Thread scheduler is unable to provide requested parallelism; consider asking for fewer threads.
